# axm_app (Data Source)

Fetches information about a specific app from Apple Business Manager.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "axm_app" "example" {
  id = "361309726"
}

output "example_app" {
  value = data.axm_app.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The app ID.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `app_store_url` (String) The App Store URL.
- `bundle_id` (String) The app bundle identifier.
- `is_custom_app` (Boolean) Whether the app is custom.
- `name` (String) The app name.
- `supported_os` (List of String) Supported operating systems.
- `type` (String) The resource type.
- `version` (String) The app version.
- `website_url` (String) The app website URL.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
